findings.evidence: `Isotopy.lean:12-15` and `:49-53`, `:145-150` use the level-preserving total-map formulation; roadmap extract `references/bz-knot-foundations.md:29-40` gives Burde-Zieschang Defs. 1.1/1.2 with the same formulation, while `rg 'Burde|Zieschang' code/TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy/Isotopy.lean` has no hit.
findings.fix: Add a module-doc attribution, e.g. that the definitions follow Burde-Zieschang, Knots, Ch. 1 Defs. 1.1 and 1.2, generalized to this continuous/topological setting.
findings.issue: The module defines isotopy and ambient isotopy as level-preserving embeddings/homeomorphisms without crediting the Burde-Zieschang definitions it closely follows.

summary: The new isotopy foundations follow an identifiable roadmap source but only credit the roadmap, not the underlying book definitions they formalize.
